visualTarget: wide simulator dashboard: left run/template rail, center story/action/resolution/POV workspace, right role/clue/status rail
matchedStructure: top current-run heading and status chips
center current story and goal panel
action submission panel with risk controls
bottom AI resolution, multi-POV, and personal story-card panels
right role status, clue/fate net, and runtime status panels
limitations: template thumbnail images are represented by dark placeholder art in the static Web cabin
narrow-screen responsiveness is usability-only and not part of the 1610x977 match target
